touches.ai_summary: Outbound LinkedIn message to VP of Sales introducing AskElephant's conversation intelligence platform. Sophia responded positively, expressed interest in learning more about forecasting accuracy improvements.

Brief qualification call to understand EchoMetrics' current setup and pain points. Sophia mentioned they're currently evaluating Fireflies but aren't fully satisfied with forecasting insights. Team of ~25 sales reps needs better pipeline visibility.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your search for conversation intelligence right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our forecast accuracy is inconsistent - leadership doesn't trust the numbers we're giving them quarter over quarter.

questions_asked.question: How does your platform differ from Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: We focus specifically on revenue signal extraction and forecasting, not just transcription. Our AI identifies deal risk and buyer intent patterns that directly feed forecast models.

next_steps: Sophia to share current forecasting process

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call continued. Discussed team size (23 seats needed), current tools, and budget expectations. Sophia confirmed executive sponsor Omar Byrne (SVP Revenue) is championing better forecasting infrastructure. Competitive evaluation with Fireflies is active.

questions_asked.question: Who else is involved in the decision-making process?
questions_asked.answer: Omar Byrne, our SVP of Revenue, is the exec sponsor. He's frustrated with our current forecast miss rate and wants AI-driven insights.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: For 23 seats with consulting package, typically 2-3 weeks including workflow integration and team training.

questions_asked.question: Are you evaluating other vendors besides Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: Fireflies is the main alternative we're considering, but they seem more focused on note-taking than strategic forecasting.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with discovery call agenda, forecasting accuracy case study (similar SaaS company improved accuracy by 34%), and calendar invite including Omar Byrne. Sophia confirmed attendance.

questions_asked.question: Can you share the case study metrics in advance?
questions_asked.answer: Attached PDF shows 34% forecast accuracy improvement and 22% reduction in late-stage slippage for a 900-employee SaaS company.

next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Sophia to map current forecasting workflow and pain points. Discussed manual forecast reviews, lack of early warning signals, and sales rep inconsistency in updating CRM. Sophia confirmed budget authority and Q2 timeline preference. Mentioned Fireflies demo scheduled for following week.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your current forecast review process.
questions_asked.answer: Every Friday, managers manually review pipeline and gut-check deal stages. It's subjective and time-consuming - often takes 3-4 hours.

questions_asked.question: What would success look like 6 months after implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Omar wants to see forecast accuracy above 90% and earlier identification of at-risk deals - ideally before they slip.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, native integration. We pull conversation data and push risk scores, sentiment, and next-step recommendations directly into SFDC.

next_steps: Prepare custom demo focused on forecasting

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with technical integration documentation, Salesforce integration overview, and proposed demo agenda focused on forecasting accuracy use case. Included ROI calculator based on EchoMetrics' team size.

Quick call to confirm demo logistics and address Sophia's questions about data privacy and compliance. Discussed SOC2 certification and GDPR compliance. Sophia mentioned Fireflies demo went well but lacked forecasting depth.

questions_asked.question: How do you handle sensitive customer data in call recordings?
questions_asked.answer: We're SOC2 Type II certified, support data residency requirements, and offer PII redaction. Customers control retention policies.

questions_asked.question: How did the Fireflies demo compare to your expectations?
questions_asked.answer: Good transcription quality, but the forecasting features feel basic - mostly just keyword tracking. Not the predictive intelligence Omar is looking for.

next_steps: Include live forecasting dashboard in demo

touches.ai_summary: First technical evaluation session. Demonstrated core platform including conversation AI, deal risk scoring, and forecasting dashboard. Sophia tested live with sample EchoMetrics data. Strong positive reaction to early warning signals and automated next-step recommendations. Omar joined last 15 minutes, asked about reporting and exec visibility.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the risk factors for our specific sales process?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, risk model is tunable. We'll work with your team during onboarding to calibrate based on your win/loss patterns.

questions_asked.question: How does this feed into our existing forecast process?
questions_asked.answer: Dashboard shows AI-predicted close probability by deal, which you can export or sync to SFDC. Replaces manual Friday review with real-time intelligence.

questions_asked.question: What level of exec reporting do you provide? (asked by Omar)
questions_asked.answer: Executive dashboard shows pipeline health, forecast accuracy trends, team performance, and early-warning deal counts. Fully customizable.

objections: Omar expressed concern about adoption - team needs to actually use it for AI to be valuable
next_steps: Second eval session to cover integrations and admin setup

touches.ai_summary: Second technical evaluation focused on Salesforce integration, admin controls, and team rollout. Demonstrated automations package and consulting services. Sophia asked detailed questions about training and ongoing support. Discussion of implementation timeline and team onboarding approach.

questions_asked.question: What does the consulting package include for our team size?
questions_asked.answer: For 23 seats: custom onboarding, workflow design, 2 training sessions, dedicated CSM, and monthly optimization reviews for first quarter.

questions_asked.question: How long before we see ROI?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers see measurable forecast accuracy improvement within 30-45 days once the AI has sufficient conversation data to train on.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: We need to finalize by end of month to hit Q2 rollout. Still comparing with Fireflies, but your forecasting capabilities are significantly stronger.

next_steps: Include implementation timeline and consulting scope
Sophia to discuss internally with Omar

touches.ai_summary: Sent formal proposal email including: $18,800 ACV for 23 seats with automations_plus_consulting package, implementation timeline, consulting scope, ROI projections, and contract terms. Included reference customer contact for similar forecasting use case.
next_steps: Proposal review call scheduled for 3 days out

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email checking in on proposal review. Sophia responded that she's reviewing with Omar and finance team. Mentioned that Fireflies came in significantly lower on price, asked if there's flexibility.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on pricing? Fireflies quoted us about 30% less.
questions_asked.answer: Let's discuss on our call - I want to make sure we're comparing apples to apples on features, especially the consulting and forecasting capabilities.

next_steps: Prepare pricing discussion for proposal call

touches.ai_summary: Brief email confirming proposal call timing and asking Sophia to share specific Fireflies proposal details for comparison. Emphasized differentiation on forecasting accuracy vs. basic transcription.

Proposal review call with Sophia. Discussed pricing comparison with Fireflies and value differentiation. Sophia confirmed forecasting capabilities are critical and worth premium, but needs to justify budget to finance. Agreed to explore options that fit their Q2 budget constraints while maintaining core forecasting features.

questions_asked.question: Can we phase the rollout to reduce upfront cost?
questions_asked.answer: We could start with core platform for all 23 seats and add consulting in Q3, but forecasting accuracy improves faster with consulting included from day one.

questions_asked.question: What's the budget constraint we're working with?
questions_asked.answer: We have Q2 budget approved, but finance is pushing back on anything above $15K. Omar is advocating but needs us to meet closer to that range.

objections: Price point significantly above Fireflies - need to justify premium to finance team
next_steps: Sophia to discuss with Omar and finance

touches.ai_summary: Email with revised pricing proposal: $14,300 ACV (24% discount) maintaining 23 seats and automations_plus_consulting package. Emphasized forecasting ROI justification and limited-time Q2 pricing. Included finance-friendly ROI one-pager.

Pricing negotiation call with Sophia. Discussed revised $14,300 offer, contract terms, and implementation start date. Sophia confirmed discount gets them within budget and she'll recommend to Omar. Discussed annual vs. multi-year options. Agreement to move forward pending legal review.

questions_asked.question: If we commit to a 2-year term, is there additional discount available?
questions_asked.answer: For 2-year commitment we could lock this rate and include additional training sessions in year 2, but annual is standard for first-time customers.

questions_asked.question: What's the approval process from here?
questions_asked.answer: Omar will sign off this week, then legal review - typically 5-7 days. Targeting signature by end of month to hit Q2 implementation.

questions_asked.question: Can we get started on technical setup before contract signature?
questions_asked.answer: We can begin integration planning and environment setup once we have verbal commitment and contract is in legal review.

touches.ai_summary: Final follow-up email with contract documents, implementation kickoff timeline, and onboarding coordinator introduction. Sophia confirmed Omar approved, contract sent to legal team for review. Expected signature within week.
next_steps: Contract signature expected by month end

outcome.churn_reason: did not see enough ROI for the price
